description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of 'Naturalia Granola' with a red and white color scheme. The front features a vibrant image of granola with strawberries and blueberries in a bowl, along with the product name in large, playful fonts and a '0% azúcares añadidos' (no added sugars) badge. The back of the box provides detailed product information, including serving suggestions with illustrations for granola, fruits, milk, and yogurt, as well as icons for different flavors. The sides of the box are solid red, one displaying the product name vertically and the other listing nutritional information and ingredients in white text. The box appears sturdy and is designed to stand upright, typical for cereal or snack packaging. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with clear branding and flavor cues.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Naturalia Granola, featuring vibrant fruit imagery and clear branding on a red and white background, with nutritional and product information on the back and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Naturalia Granola branding, a bowl of granola with fruit, and a '0% azúcares añadidos' badge.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid red background, vertical product name, and a small fruit flavor icon.
description_view_2: Back view displaying serving suggestions, illustrations, and detailed product information in a structured layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with nutritional facts and ingredients listed in white text on a red background.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Naturalia' brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and back, featuring stylized brown and red text with a small red leaf graphic above the 'u'.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows images of strawberries and blueberries, and the text 'sabor frutos rojos' (red fruit flavor) is clearly visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on one side of the box in white text, including serving size, calories, and vitamin content.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A '0% azúcares añadidos' (no added sugars) badge is present on the front, serving as a promotional health claim.
